Title: Forgot Password link not working
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Open login page 2. Click Forgot Password
Expected Result: User should be redirected to reset page

Title: Account Lock remove on page refresh
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Enter wrong credentials 5 times 2. Refresh page

Title: After Logi, Logout Button Not working
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Login with valid credentials 2. Click logout
Expected Result: Should go back to login page

Title: Password with extra space fails
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Enter valid credentials 2. Add space in password
